title: PVP Club Stats
description:
This mod adds 2 Key features for Mcpvp, Minemen, Catpvp  more coming: 

- Auto gg once a round is over you send a auto gg msg

- Lightweight Score board that tracks your wins and losses on your time in the server once u exit u have the option to save it
body:
This mod adds 2 Key features for Mcpvp, Minemen, and Catpvp 

**MORE FEATURES COMING SOON**

- Auto gg once a round is over you send a auto gg msg.

- Lightweight Score board that tracks your wins and losses on your time in the server once u exit u have the option to save it which will end up in the S menu you see in you minecraft home loading screen.
